title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 21st April 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Good bet on every decline; confidently targets servicing 25% of GDP by 2030.
recommendations.detail: Even being a PSU bank, SBI confidently reports it will service 25% of GDP by 2030 — shows how aggressively it thinks. A good bet on every decline; no need to think too much.

recommendations.note: Value-unlocking signs (HDFC Sec, AMC, Life); at not even 11-12 PE, will attract buyers.
recommendations.detail: Largest private bank, competitively placed; value-unlocking signs given subsidiaries (HDFC Securities, HDFC AMC) and already-divested HDFC Life. Including investment value it's available at not even 11-12 PE; will attract buyers at some point.

recommendations.note: Up ~150% from earlier call; high-PE (~86-87) but performing; buy near 900 on any post-result dip.
recommendations.detail: At 52-week high, ~150% return from his earlier call; now high-PE (~86-87) but performing in line with results (profit Rs 65 cr Sep to ~Rs 94 cr Dec; Q4 to come well; new France JV). Forms higher tops/bottoms — any post-result correction close to 900 is a good entry.

recommendations.note: Segment leader among small-cap schemes; start investing (also Nippon India, Invesco Small Cap).
recommendations.detail: For a caller wanting the best small-cap fund: named Bandhan Small Cap (segment leader), Nippon India Small Cap and Invesco Small Cap as outperformers; advised starting with Bandhan.
